[[Sky Sports]] Action |{{cite news |title=Hull KR beat Saints to reach Grand Final |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cjedpe1ljjyo |access-date=4 October 2025 |work=BBC Sport |date=4 October 2025}} |} ==Challenge Cup== {{main|2025 Challenge Cup}} On 25 June 2024, the [[Rugby Football League|RFL]] announced a change to the Challenge Cup format, totalling 7 rounds compared to the previous 9, with Super League teams entering to play away from home at round 3.{{Cite web |date=25 June 2024 |title=New format for Betfred Challenge Cup in 2025 |url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/62890/new-format-for-betfred-challenge-cup-in-2025 |access-date=28 September 2025 |website=[[Rugby Football League]]}} St Helens were first drawn on 14 January to play [[West Hull A.R.L.F.C.]] away in Round 3 following West Hull's Round 2 24–18 victory against [[Hunslet A.R.L.F.C.]] on 25 January.{{cite news |title=Holders Wigan face possible Sheffield tie in cup |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cj48vxx28rlo |access-date=28 September 2025 |work=BBC Sport |date=14 January 2025}} The fixture was originally set to be played at West Hull's Johnny Whiteley Park in [[Gipsyville]], however after the venue was ruled out due to having an unsuitable pitch, the fixture was moved to [[Hull Kingston Rovers]]' [[Craven Park, Hull|Craven Park]] stadium on the other side of the city.{{cite news |last1=Staniforth |first1=Mark |title=West Hull denied St Helens dream venue as Hull KR step in for Challenge Cup clash |url=https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/west-hull-denied-st-helens-9901167 |access-date=28 September 2025 |work=Hull Daily Mail |date=28 January 2025}} Following their victory against West Hull, St Helens beat the [[Leeds Rhinos]] 22–14 at home on 14 March,{{cite news |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron |title=Kyle Feldt sparks St Helens' Challenge Cup cruise against Leeds |url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2025/mar/14/st-helens-leeds-challenge-cup-match-report-rugby-league |access-date=28 September 2025 |work=The Guardian |date=14 March 2025 |location=London}} qualifying them for the quarter-finals against the [[Warrington Wolves]].{{cite news |title=BBC to show Hull derby and Wire v Saints cup ties |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cx2r1gpyl43o |access-date=28 September 2025 |work=BBC Sport |date=18 March 2025}} St Helens were ultimately knocked out of the 2025 Challenge Cup by Warrington during the quarter-final fixture.{{cite news |title=Warrington beat Saints to reach Challenge Cup semis |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cvgpx747p94o
